title: NGO Awareness Campaign
context: A climate change NGO needs an awareness campaign. The brief was written by committee. It has everything wrong with it — and some missing information you'll need to flag.

requirements.text: The campaign must create urgency about the climate crisis
requirements.explanation: Creating urgency is the core purpose of a climate awareness campaign.

requirements.text: But don't make people feel scared or overwhelmed — keep it positive
requirements.explanation: Creating urgency and avoiding fear are contradictory emotional directions. Research shows some level of concern is needed to motivate action.

requirements.text: Use humour to make the message more shareable
requirements.explanation: Humour can work for awareness campaigns but needs careful handling for serious topics.

requirements.text: The tone must be serious and gravely serious at all times
requirements.explanation: Humorous and gravely serious are contradictory tones — choose one.

requirements.text: Target young people (18–30) on social platforms
requirements.explanation: Young audiences are the primary target for climate awareness — they are both affected and motivated to act.

requirements.text: Also target government policymakers through official channels
requirements.explanation: Policy influence is a valid secondary goal but requires a different approach, budget, and content than social campaigns.
£500 is extremely limited — this severely constrains channel choices and forces a purely organic approach.

requirements.text: Timeline: complete before the next major political event
requirements.explanation: "Before the next major political event" is not a real deadline — it's missing information. Which event? Which date?

requirements.text: Goal: drive actual behaviour change in daily habits
requirements.explanation: Concrete behaviour change is a valid goal, though hard to measure — needs a specific KPI.
"Make it go viral" is not a requirement — it's a wish. Virality cannot be engineered on demand, especially on a £500 budget.

goals.text: Drive measurable behaviour change in daily habits
Build campaign awareness among 18–30 year olds

kpis.text: Number of pledge sign-ups or commitment actions

teachingMoment: Vague timelines like 'before the next event' without a specific date are missing information. Always flag these — an unspecified deadline is no deadline at all.
